name: Intro
_source: m;A Hint of Things to Come
s;;Krista and friends arrive at the outskirts of Orobas.|Anticipating a difficult battle ahead, they make camp and strategize.;StyleNid=overworld_narration
for;EnemyGender;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_enemy_units() if unit.generic == True and 'NoVariant' not in unit.tags]
s;Krista;Now that I think about it, I don't think I've ever been to Orobas before.
s;Parker;With how often you go to Oregot, that's surprising.
s;Krista;Moving along!|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}We'd better scout out the city before we rush in like we did in Edoyama.
s;Kai;Too bad we don't have anyone familiar with the capital to give us an advantage.
s;Anna;Jake and I have been around these parts pretty often.{c:e;Anna;FarWink} Right, honey?
s;Anna;We'd have to do some sneaking around, but we'll know how to get out of trouble.
s;Jake;Once we've got a good lay of the land, we'll high-tail it outta there and report back!
s;Jake;Of course! They don't call me "Snakey Jakey" for nothin'.
s;Anna;Like they even do in the first place, darling.|{c:e;Anna;FarWink}We'll be back in one piece, Your Highness.
s;Khalid;I can fly above the city and map things out again.
s;Kai;That may be our best option.
s;Krista;Agreed. Report back with as much as you can find, Khalid.
s;Alpin;I feel sorry for you, Father Santiago. Having the Council drag you out like this{tgm}...|{tgm}But I'm sure you understand they need protection.
s;Santiago;Of course, General Alpin. The enemy is sure to approach soon.|I shall man my post. May the Great Oreg grant you strength.
s;Alpin;Thank you, Father. You as well.

s;Santiago;Such chaotic times we live in, necessitating a man of the cloth to take up arms.|If only things did not come to this.|O Great Oreg, please forgive my enemies. They know not what they do.|{tgm}{c:e;Santiago;HalfCloseEyes}...{tgm}{w}{c:e;Santiago;CloseEyes} And please provide guidance for my own soul.|{c:e;Santiago;CloseEyes}For I know not if this is the correct path for myself.
prep;true;Prepare to Charge;Guide;True;AccessLibrary;Access the guide for tips and tricks.;gba;no_chap_disp
